overview: Plans, designs, constructs, and maintains infrastructure like roads, bridges, and buildings.

roadmap.title: Stream Selection & Foundation
key_actions: Focus on problem-solving in Mathematics and Physics.
Develop basic CAD and engineering visualization skills.

roadmap.title: B.Tech / B.E. in Civil Engineering
roadmap.description: Core civil engineering concepts, structural design, and construction management.

roadmap.title: Practical Exposure
key_actions: Intern in construction firms, infrastructure projects.
Use CAD/REVIT/STAAD for practical design experience.

roadmap.title: M.Tech / Specializations
roadmap.description: Specializations in Structural, Transportation, Geotechnical, or Environmental Engineering.
